field_changes.old:
What's new?
- See which parts of the map you've saved offline with a new overlay in the map switcher.
- Discover official routes with new badges and richer route details.
- Long press any section of your route to move it more easily in the planner.
- Completed Highlights now appear first in challenge checklists.

Bug fixes
- Improved route planning and editing stability
- Fixed several crashes
field_changes.new:
What's new? 
- Pinch to zoom on Highlight photos in full-screen

Bug fixes
- Improved the stability of route planning, navigation and recording
- Fixed crashes across the planner, Home feed and Street View
- Improved the performance and reliability of the route planner
- Fixed elevation, Live Activity and voucher issues
